assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Add_MACD_Lines_to_Array
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Add MACD Lines to Array

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Add_to_Child_Asset_Array
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Add to Child Asset Array

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Add_to_Child_Asset_Array
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Copy 1 of Add to Child Asset Array

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Child_Asset_Assignments
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Copy 1 of Child Asset Assignments

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_2_of_Child_Asset_Assignments
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Copy 2 of Child Asset Assignments

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Set_MACD_Line_Item
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Set MACD Line Item

assignments.name: Copy_2_of_Copy_2_of_Add_to_Child_Asset_Array
assignments.label: Copy 2 of Copy 2 of Add to Child Asset Array

assignments.description: Used to confirm to Sales Order MACD Update parent flow that user has exited flow.
assignments.name: Parent_Flow_Exit_Confirmation
assignments.label: Parent Flow Exit Confirmation

assignments.description: Assigns the Screen Values in Asset Information to Temp Variables. This is so that they can be cleared after the MACD Line assignment (to avoid screen data being added to Accessories).
assignments.name: Set_Asset_Info_Values
assignments.label: Set Asset Info Values

decisions.name: Check_if_it_is_an_Add_or_Change
decisions.label: Check if it is an Add or Change

decisions.name: Copy_1_of_Check_if_MACD_Exists
decisions.label: Copy 1 of Check if MACD Exists

decisions.name: Does_User_want_to_exit_flow
decisions.label: Does User want to exit flow?

decisions.description: Checks the Parent Process on the product. If Product then user needs to enter asset info. If Accessory it will skip the asset information screen. Based on request from Amy Forbes/Jennifer Sherran that accessories should not required full details to be input.
decisions.name: Is_Asset_Product_or_Accessory
decisions.label: Is Asset Product or Accessory?

decisions.name: Is_Parent_a_Product_or_Accessory
decisions.label: Is Parent a Product or Accessory?

Flow.description:
This flow is triggered by the MACD - Generate MACD flow (API: Sales_Order_MACD_Update)
Excludes Parent accessory products from being created as assets.
Flow.label: MACD - Opportunity - Asset & MACD Generator

fields.name: Exit_Flow_Guidance_Text
fields.fieldText:
If you need to leave the Generate MACD process do not close this screen, this can cause issues with duplicate assets.﻿

Please tick the exit flow buttons below and select Next. The flow will revert changes made and close.

fields.name: Cancel_and_Exit_Flow
fields.fieldText: Cancel Changes and exit Generate MACD

fields.name: Exit_Flow_Warning_Text
fields.fieldText: Please be aware that exiting the flow will reverse any changes you have made to the MACD & Assets.

fields.name: Confirm_Cancel_and_Exit_Flow
fields.fieldText: Confirm Cancel Changes and exit Generate MACD

fields.name: duplicateText
fields.fieldText: This Serial number has already been used on this MACD, please double check the serial numbers

fields.name: assetInformationSection
fields.fieldText:
Please input asset information for {!Loop_Assets.Name} - {!Loop_Assets.Product2.Name} - {!Loop_Assets.Product2.ProductCode}


Asset Configuration: {!assetConfig}

textTemplates.description: Hides the close button on screens
textTemplates.name: CSS

variables.description: When ticked shows that the user is exiting the flow.
variables.name: User_Exited_Flow_Flag
